common.game_filter_hint_install: Install zapret first to configure the game filter.
service.absent_desc: Install the bypass as a Windows service so it auto-starts on boot and keeps running without this app open.
service.stopped_desc_b: . It will start on next boot — or start it now.
home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: Manage zapret bypass — run as user process or install as Windows service.
home.hint_install: Install zapret first to enable the bypass
home.hint_pick: Pick one from the Strategies tab, then return here to engage.
home.hint_stop: Click Stop to terminate the bypass process
home.hint_engage: Click Engage to start in user mode, or install as a service below
home.game_filter_hint: Route game traffic (high TCP/UDP ports) through the bypass. Restart to apply.
home.ipset_hint: Match winws against the downloaded blocked-IP list. Restart to apply.
strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.subtitle: Pick a desync preset. If the default doesn't unblock your ISP, try ALT1 → ALT2 → ALT3…
strategies.search_placeholder: Search by id, ALT number, or description…
tester.title: Strategy Tester
tester.subtitle: Probe every strategy against Discord / YouTube / Google endpoints and auto-pick the one that unblocks the most.
tester.ready_desc_b: strategies for a few seconds — the full sweep can take several minutes.
tester.install_first: Install zapret first to run tests.
tester.collecting_sub: Each strategy appears here as it finishes.
tester.no_results_sub: Run a test to rank your strategies by reachability.
logs.title: Activity Logs
logs.subtitle: Real-time winws and installer output. Select text to copy.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Application preferences, paths and appearance.
settings.autostart_hint: Launch zapret-ui silently on login. Doesn't engage the bypass — only opens the app.
settings.tray_label: Minimize to system tray on close
settings.tray_hint: Hide to tray instead of quitting. Left-click the tray icon to reopen, right-click for more actions.
settings.autoengage_hint: When zapret-ui starts, automatically start the last-used strategy in user mode.
settings.notifications_hint: Show a toast when the bypass starts or stops.
settings.autoupdate_label: Check for zapret updates on launch
settings.autoupdate_hint: Compares your installed core to the latest tag on GitHub.
settings.installdir_hint: Where the zapret core and host lists live. Managed by the app — open to inspect.
settings.gf_hint: Route game traffic (high TCP/UDP ports) through the bypass. Restart the bypass to apply.
settings.ipset_hint_loaded_b: entries). Restart the bypass to apply.
settings.ipset_hint_none: IP matching disabled. Restart the bypass to apply.
settings.ipset_hint_any: Match any IP (no list). Restart the bypass to apply.
settings.ipset_hint_default: How ipset-all.txt is applied by winws.
settings.update_ipset_hint: Download the latest blocked-IP list (ipset-all.txt) from the zapret repository.
settings.update_hosts_hint: Compare your system hosts file with the repository's. If outdated, the downloaded copy opens for a manual merge.
settings.discord_cache_hint: Close Discord and delete its Cache, Code Cache and GPUCache folders — a common fix when Discord won't load after enabling the bypass.
settings.theme_hint: Dark by default. Light theme uses a warm off-white background.
settings.compact_hint: Tighten paddings and line heights — better on small laptop screens.
about.title: About
about.subtitle: A native Windows GUI for the zapret DPI bypass core.
about.description: A focused, native control surface for Flowseal's zapret-discord-youtube core. Pick a desync strategy, engage as a user process, or install as a Windows service — no command-line required.
about.av_desc: The bypass works by manipulating raw socket packets — some AVs read that as malware-like behavior. It's a false positive. If you hit one, add the installation folder to your AV exclusions.
hosts.title: Update hosts file
hosts.subtitle: Your hosts file is out of date. Copy these entries into it (editing it needs admin rights).
msg.hosts_up_to_date: Hosts file is already up to date
msg.hosts_out_of_date: Out of date — review the entries and update your hosts file
admin.banner_desc: Engaging the bypass, testing strategies and managing the Windows service all need administrator rights. Restart the app as administrator to enable them.
notify.tray_body: The app keeps working in the system tray. Click the tray icon to reopen it, or use Quit to exit.
